name: Multiple injuries from ladder fall at work, all covered?
description: Yes, every injury from the incident.

mainEntity.name: Multiple injuries from ladder fall at work, all covered?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, every injury from the incident.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, all work-related injuries compensated, even if varied.**

Head, back, legs—all if from fall. Ackley covers multiples.[1]

- List all in claim.
- Ongoing treatment.
- Permanent ratings each.

Full eval ensures nothing missed.
